name: R-7 (SS-84)
events: 31 May 1942 USS R-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda for an overhaul.
4 Aug 1942 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda via patrol station about 300 nautical miles north of Bermuda.
28 Feb 1943 USS R-7 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
4 Mar 1943 USS R-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
12 Apr 1943 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Portsmouth, New Hampshire.
13 Apr 1943 USS R-7 arrived at Portsmouth, New Hampshire from New London, Connecticut.
25 Apr 1943 USS R-7 returned to New London, Connecticut from Portsmouth, New Hampshire.
13 May 1943 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Throgs Neck, New York to aid in the calibration of the magnetic detection loop at that location.
15 May 1943 USS R-7 returned to New London, Connecticut from Throgs Neck, New York.
21 May 1943 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
26 May 1943 USS R-7 arrived at Bermuda from New London, Connecticut.
18 Aug 1943 USS R-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
2 Sep 1943 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
7 Sep 1943 USS R-7 arrived at Bermuda from New London, Connecticut.
20 Dec 1943 USS R-7 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
24 Dec 1943 USS R-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
2 Aug 1945 USS R-7 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
8 Aug 1945 USS R-7 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
9 Aug 1945 USS R-7 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
5 Sep 1945 USS R-7 departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard for decommissioning.
6 Sep 1945 USS R-7 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
